metadata.description: Batch 48 - additional Oxford 5000 words 1701-1800; source-aligned from attached PDF

words.definitionEn: a small shop or a delay in progress
words.definitionTh: แผงลอย / หยุดชะงัก
words.example: A communication fault can stall production.

words.definitionEn: a public position or way of standing
words.definitionTh: จุดยืน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “stance”.

words.definitionEn: continuing or officially recognized
words.definitionTh: ที่มีอยู่ / สถานะ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “standing”.

words.definitionEn: very clear, severe, or complete
words.definitionTh: ชัดเจนรุนแรง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “stark”.

words.definitionEn: to suffer or die from lack of food
words.definitionTh: อดอยาก
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “starve”.

words.definitionEn: relating to the analysis of numerical data
words.definitionTh: ทางสถิติ
words.example: Use statistical analysis to validate the result.

words.definitionEn: in a regular and continuous way
words.definitionTh: อย่างสม่ำเสมอ
words.example: Accuracy improved steadily during the trial.

words.definitionEn: water vapor used for heat or power
words.definitionTh: ไอน้ำ
words.example: Keep steam away from the camera enclosure.

words.definitionEn: to control the direction of movement
words.definitionTh: บังคับทิศทาง
words.example: The guide rails steer products into position.

words.definitionEn: a plant stalk; to originate from
words.definitionTh: ลำต้น / เกิดจาก
words.example: The fault may stem from unstable lighting.

words.definitionEn: a fixed oversimplified idea about a group
words.definitionTh: ภาพเหมารวม
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “stereotype”.

words.definitionEn: to cause increased activity or interest
words.definitionTh: กระตุ้น
words.example: The pilot stimulated new improvement ideas.

words.definitionEn: something that causes a reaction
words.definitionTh: สิ่งเร้า
words.example: The alarm acts as a stimulus for action.

words.definitionEn: to mix by moving; to cause activity
words.definitionTh: คน / กวน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “stir”.

words.definitionEn: the keeping of data or goods for future use
words.definitionTh: การจัดเก็บ
words.example: Calculate data storage requirements.

words.definitionEn: clear and easy to understand
words.definitionTh: ตรงไปตรงมา
words.example: The setup process is straightforward.

words.definitionEn: pressure or damage caused by stretching
words.definitionTh: ความตึงเครียด
words.example: The bracket is under mechanical strain.

words.definitionEn: a single thin length or sequence
words.definitionTh: เส้น / สาย
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “strand”.

words.definitionEn: designed to achieve a long-term objective
words.definitionTh: เชิงกลยุทธ์
words.example: The project supports a strategic objective.

words.definitionEn: to make stronger
words.definitionTh: ทำให้แข็งแรง
words.example: Add a brace to strengthen the frame.

words.definitionEn: in a way that follows rules exactly
words.definitionTh: อย่างเคร่งครัด
words.example: Follow the safety procedure strictly.

words.definitionEn: very noticeable or impressive
words.definitionTh: โดดเด่น
words.example: The data shows a striking improvement.

words.definitionEn: a long narrow piece
words.definitionTh: แถบยาว
words.example: Cut a narrow strip of protective film.

words.definitionEn: to remove a covering or layer
words.definitionTh: ลอกออก
words.example: Strip the damaged insulation from the wire.

words.definitionEn: to make a great effort
words.definitionTh: พยายามอย่างหนัก
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “strive”.

words.definitionEn: a hit or movement; a serious brain event
words.definitionTh: จังหวะ / โรคหลอดเลือดสมอง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “stroke”.

words.definitionEn: relating to the arrangement of connected parts
words.definitionTh: เชิงโครงสร้าง
words.example: Check the structural stability of the frame.

words.definitionEn: to trip or make an unsteady mistake
words.definitionTh: สะดุด
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “stumble”.

words.definitionEn: to shock or temporarily disable
words.definitionTh: ทำให้ตะลึง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “stun”.

words.definitionEn: extremely impressive or attractive
words.definitionTh: น่าทึ่ง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “stunning”.

words.definitionEn: the act of formally sending information
words.definitionTh: การส่ง
words.example: Review the supplier submission.

words.definitionEn: a person who receives a service regularly
words.definitionTh: สมาชิกผู้รับข้อมูล
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “subscriber”.

words.definitionEn: an arrangement to receive a service regularly
words.definitionTh: การสมัครสมาชิก
words.example: Renew the software subscription.

words.definitionEn: coming later in time
words.definitionTh: ภายหลัง
words.example: Record subsequent changes in the log.

words.definitionEn: after an earlier event
words.definitionTh: ต่อมา
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “subsequently”.

words.definitionEn: money given to support an activity
words.definitionTh: เงินอุดหนุน
words.example: The project received an energy subsidy.

words.definitionEn: large in amount or importance
words.definitionTh: มาก / สำคัญ
words.example: The trial achieved a substantial reduction.

words.definitionEn: to a great degree
words.definitionTh: อย่างมาก
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “substantially”.

words.definitionEn: a person or thing used instead of another
words.definitionTh: สิ่งทดแทน / แทนที่
words.example: Use the approved sensor as a substitute.

words.definitionEn: the act of replacing one thing with another
words.definitionTh: การทดแทน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “substitution”.

words.definitionEn: small and difficult to notice
words.definitionTh: ละเอียดอ่อน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “subtle”.

words.definitionEn: an area outside a city center
words.definitionTh: ชานเมือง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “suburb”.

words.definitionEn: relating to the outer part of a city
words.definitionTh: เกี่ยวกับชานเมือง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “suburban”.

words.definitionEn: a sequence in which one follows another
words.definitionTh: การสืบต่อ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “succession”.

words.definitionEn: following one after another
words.definitionTh: ต่อเนื่องกัน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “successive”.

words.definitionEn: a person who takes over a role
words.definitionTh: ผู้สืบทอด
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “successor”.

words.definitionEn: to draw liquid or air inward
words.definitionTh: ดูด
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “suck”.

words.definitionEn: to start legal action against someone
words.definitionTh: ฟ้องร้อง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “sue”.

words.definitionEn: physical or emotional pain
words.definitionTh: ความทุกข์
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “suffering”.

words.definitionEn: enough for a particular need
words.definitionTh: เพียงพอ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “sufficient”.

words.definitionEn: to an adequate degree
words.definitionTh: อย่างเพียงพอ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “sufficiently”.

words.definitionEn: the act of intentionally ending one’s own life
words.definitionTh: การฆ่าตัวตาย
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “suicide”.

words.definitionEn: a set of rooms or related software programs
words.definitionTh: ชุดห้อง / ชุดโปรแกรม
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “suite”.

words.definitionEn: a meeting of senior leaders
words.definitionTh: การประชุมสุดยอด
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “summit”.

words.definitionEn: extremely good or above normal
words.definitionTh: ยอดเยี่ยม
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “super”.

words.definitionEn: excellent and of high quality
words.definitionTh: ดีเยี่ยม
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “superb”.

words.definitionEn: an official responsible for managing an organization
words.definitionTh: ผู้กำกับดูแล
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “superintendent”.

words.definitionEn: higher in quality, rank, or ability
words.definitionTh: เหนือกว่า
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “superior”.

words.definitionEn: to watch and direct work
words.definitionTh: กำกับดูแล
words.example: A qualified engineer must supervise installation.

words.definitionEn: the act of watching and directing work
words.definitionTh: การกำกับดูแล
words.example: Testing requires technical supervision.

words.definitionEn: a person who manages workers
words.definitionTh: หัวหน้างาน
words.example: The supervisor approved the restart.

words.definitionEn: something added to improve completeness; to add
words.definitionTh: ส่วนเสริม / เสริม
words.example: Use manual checks to supplement the camera trial.

words.definitionEn: giving help or encouragement
words.definitionTh: ให้การสนับสนุน
words.example: Management was supportive of the pilot.

words.definitionEn: according to what is generally believed
words.definitionTh: ตามที่เชื่อกัน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “supposedly”.

words.definitionEn: to prevent or stop something from being expressed
words.definitionTh: ระงับ
words.example: The filter suppresses electrical noise.

words.definitionEn: highest in rank or quality
words.definitionTh: สูงสุด
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “supreme”.

words.definitionEn: a sudden strong increase; to rise suddenly
words.definitionTh: การพุ่งขึ้น
words.example: Protect the controller from a voltage surge.

words.definitionEn: a doctor who performs operations
words.definitionTh: ศัลยแพทย์
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “surgeon”.

words.definitionEn: relating to medical operations
words.definitionTh: ทางศัลยกรรม
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “surgical”.

words.definitionEn: an amount greater than what is needed
words.definitionTh: ส่วนเกิน
words.example: Store surplus parts in the cabinet.

words.definitionEn: to stop resisting and accept defeat
words.definitionTh: ยอมจำนน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “surrender”.

words.definitionEn: close observation for safety or security
words.definitionTh: การเฝ้าระวัง
words.example: The camera provides process surveillance.

words.definitionEn: the state of remaining alive or operating
words.definitionTh: การอยู่รอด
words.example: Backup power supports system survival.

words.definitionEn: a person who remains alive after danger
words.definitionTh: ผู้รอดชีวิต
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “survivor”.

words.definitionEn: to temporarily stop an activity
words.definitionTh: ระงับชั่วคราว
words.example: Suspend the test if safety conditions change.

words.definitionEn: the act of temporarily stopping something
words.definitionTh: การระงับ
words.example: Document the reason for suspension.

words.definitionEn: a belief that something may be wrong
words.definitionTh: ความสงสัย
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “suspicion”.

words.definitionEn: causing doubt or mistrust
words.definitionTh: น่าสงสัย
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “suspicious”.

words.definitionEn: to keep something continuing over time
words.definitionTh: คงไว้
words.example: The system must sustain high-speed operation.

words.definitionEn: able to continue without harming future resources
words.definitionTh: ยั่งยืน
words.example: Choose a sustainable inspection method.

words.definitionEn: to make food or liquid move down the throat
words.definitionTh: กลืน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “swallow”.

words.definitionEn: to move back and forth; a back-and-forth movement
words.definitionTh: แกว่ง / การแกว่ง
words.example: The arm can swing into the work area.

words.definitionEn: a weapon with a long sharp blade
words.definitionTh: ดาบ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “sword”.

words.definitionEn: representing an idea through a symbol
words.definitionTh: เชิงสัญลักษณ์
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “symbolic”.

words.definitionEn: showing understanding of another’s feelings
words.definitionTh: เห็นอกเห็นใจ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “sympathetic”.

words.definitionEn: a group of symptoms occurring together
words.definitionTh: กลุ่มอาการ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “syndrome”.

words.definitionEn: the combination of ideas or materials into a whole
words.definitionTh: การสังเคราะห์
words.example: The report provides a synthesis of all findings.

words.definitionEn: organized according to a clear method
words.definitionTh: เป็นระบบ
words.example: Use a systematic validation process.

words.definitionEn: to deal with a difficult issue; a physical challenge
words.definitionTh: จัดการ / การเข้าปะทะ
words.example: The team will tackle the defect at its source.

words.definitionEn: a planned method for achieving a short-term goal
words.definitionTh: กลยุทธ์ย่อย
words.example: Adjusting the angle is a useful tactic.

words.definitionEn: relating to detailed actions supporting a strategy
words.definitionTh: เชิงยุทธวิธี
words.example: The action is tactical rather than strategic.

words.definitionEn: a label; to attach identifying information
words.definitionTh: ป้ายกำกับ / ติดป้าย
words.example: Tag each image with the defect type.

words.definitionEn: to touch lightly; a device controlling flow
words.definitionTh: แตะ / ก๊อก
words.example: Tap the screen to open the record.

words.definitionEn: a person who pays tax
words.definitionTh: ผู้เสียภาษี
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “taxpayer”.

words.definitionEn: relating to technology
words.definitionTh: ทางเทคโนโลยี
words.example: The upgrade is a major technological improvement.

words.definitionEn: a person aged from thirteen to nineteen
words.definitionTh: วัยรุ่น
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “teen”.

words.definitionEn: a building used for religious worship
words.definitionTh: วัด
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “temple”.

words.definitionEn: for a limited period of time
words.definitionTh: ชั่วคราว
words.example: The line was temporarily stopped.

words.definitionEn: to attract someone toward something unwise
words.definitionTh: ล่อลวง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “tempt”.

words.definitionEn: a person who rents property
words.definitionTh: ผู้เช่า
words.example: The tenant reported a maintenance issue.
